steps.title: Use the scale factor
steps.content: The triangles are similar, and corresponding side $MN$ is $2$ times side $JK$. Therefore the linear scale factor from triangle JKL to triangle MNP is $2$.

steps.title: Scale the perimeter
steps.content: Perimeters of similar figures scale by the same linear factor. $$24(2)=48$$ The answer is B.
